_comment: Prettier Configuration with Tailwind CSS Class Sorting
This configuration automatically sorts Tailwind classes in your code.
The plugin uses Tailwind's recommended class order for consistency.
IMPORTANT: prettier-plugin-tailwindcss MUST be the last plugin in the array!
- Use 'tailwindStylesheet' to point to your CSS file with @theme
- Use 'tailwindConfig' to point to your tailwind.config.js/ts
